---
title: "About"
---

The Living Book is the public-facing explanation layer for Circle Calculus. It connects papers, theorem ids, dictionary entries, Python examples, and Lean declarations without changing their meaning.

The theorem manifests are the source of truth for proof status. Lean is the formal proof source. Python and browser widgets are executable and visual aids.

## Attribution

Circle Calculus is released under the MIT License. If you use the project, cite Corben Sorenson and the public repository. See `CITATION.cff` at the repository root.

<script type="module" src="widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
